meta.title: Voyager Standard Stack
meta.description: Drop into the root of a Voyager child-theme repo as 'blueprint.json' so wp-now picks it up on start. Boots a full Voyager environment: parent block theme + core/blocks/orbit plugin suite, with the cwd activated as the child theme. Companion to skills/wp-lab/presets/voyager-stack.json.
meta.author: Voyager Marketing

steps._comment: Parent theme. Replace with {resource: 'literal', files: {...}} or a 'literal' filesystem mount if working offline. wp-now resolves git: resources via Playground when online.

wp-now mounts the cwd at /wp-content/themes/<basename>. The active child theme is whatever directory you launch wp-now from. Replace ${CHILD_THEME_SLUG} or remove this step and activate manually post-boot via: npx wp-now wp theme activate <slug>.

steps.command: wp option update blogname 'Voyager Dev — local'
